---
title: "Machine learning for vegetation monitoring"
date: 2022-06-01
categories: [AI/ML, Remote Sensing, Biodiversity monitoring, Teaching]
description: "A seminar on using machine learning and satellite data to monitor vegetation."
---

::: {.article}

[← Back to blog](../../blog.qmd){.text-link}

::: {.article__head}
<div class="article__meta"><span>2022 · 06 · 01</span><span>·</span><span>seminar</span><span>·</span><span style="color:var(--accent);">AI/ML</span></div>

# Machine learning for vegetation monitoring

<p class="hero__tag" style="text-align:left; margin:0; max-width:62ch;">A seminar from early 2022 covering the past few years of my research at SAEON.</p>
:::

::: {.prose}

I gave this seminar at SAEON in early 2022. It covers the previous few years of my work on monitoring vegetation with machine learning and satellite data.

<div style="position:relative; aspect-ratio:16/9;">
  <iframe style="position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; border:0; border-radius:10px;" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/G_Ec-ptVd1I" title="Machine learning for vegetation monitoring" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

:::

:::
